untranslatable_reason: Signal requires a quality-control statistical filter detecting regime shifts (S_t statistic and cumulative deviations from expected value E[y_t]) which are not available in the allowed indicator set. The entry conditions reference abstract thresholds [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] and a custom S_t statistic that must be defined externally. Without specification of how S_t is calculated or the exact threshold multiplier and confirmation period values, this cannot be translated to concrete tradeable rules using only standard technical indicators.
translation_notes: This is a meta-rule for event detection based on statistical anomalies. The signal describes a framework (quality control filter, regime detection) rather than concrete technical conditions. To implement: (1) define the S_t statistic calculation, (2) specify threshold_h_multiplier, confirmation_periods, and lookback_periods values, (3) clarify what 'expected value E[y_t]' means in context (e.g., SMA of returns). A placeholder interpretation using returns direction was provided but does not capture the intended statistical shift detection logic.
